title: Shift
drDigitalIntro: Holding Shift while typing a letter makes it uppercase. Holding it while pressing a number types the symbol shown on the top half of that key — like turning 1 into an exclamation point.
drDigitalSuccess: That's Shift — your key for capital letters and symbols!
drDigitalHint: There's a Shift key on each side of the keyboard. Find one, then click Continue.
